lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Welcome to my store, human! Are you interested in buying anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'm looking for some armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Say, would you be interested in doing a little task for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: A special client has a little request for me. I will need [3/4/5] [item] in the next [15/20/25] minutes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I'll get you [3/4/5] [item] in the next [15/20/25] minutes. I can do that, yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have time for that, no.

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: That's really unfortunate. I hope I can find someone else.

sections.title: Getting a bar or ore item request

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Say, would you be interested in doing a little task for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the task?

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: I'm running a low on raw supplies at the moment. In the next [X] minutes, I need [X] [item]. Sounds agreeable?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I'll get you [X] [item] in the next [X] minutes. I can do that, yes.

sections.title: Talking to him before acquiring the item request

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: How are you doing getting me my [X] [item]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to look for them anymore.

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Next time, can you decide on that in advance?

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: You've put me in a spot of trouble now. I suppose I'll find a way out though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still looking for them.

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Good, good. Hurry back!

sections.title: Talking to him after failing to bring the request in time

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Great, now the [X] minutes are up and you didn't get me [X] [item].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, yeah, sorry...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've brought you your [X] [item]!

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Excellent, much appreciated!

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or do you want me to show you how to fight properly in these?

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?

lines.speaker: Saro
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like the gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please teach me that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me the gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enlighten me.
